items.caption: A digital rendering or a photograph of a garden design concept. it features a detailed layout of a garden with various elements such as pathways, raised beds, and greenery. there are several people in the garden, suggesting a scale of the design. the image includes text that seems to be part of a letter or a document, mentioning a "landmark trust" and a "castle knot garden design." there are also references to "rhoda maw" and "kasia howard," which could be names associated with the design or the project. the text also mentions a competition and a commendation, indicating that the design may have been recognized or entered into a contest. the image is informative, likely used for educational or promotional purposes related to landscape design and gardening.
